span.p:
Write searchProfileFinal
status = executed
query_stats + serp_explorer

span.p:
Write discovery payload
candidate payload
approved and candidate URL lists

span.p: PHASE 4: RERANK + TRIAGE

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
rerankSearchResults()
deterministic URL scoring

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Outer triage gate
serpTriageEnabled
quality threshold
uberMode or llmEnabled + llmSerpRerankEnabled

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
rerankSerpResults()
reason = uber_serp_reranker
role = plan
inner function still falls back to deterministic if LLM gate is closed

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Discovered URLs
min(discoveryCap, serpTriageMaxUrls) when triage applies

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Deterministic threshold triage fallback
score >= serpTriageMinScore
cap = serpTriageMaxUrls

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: PHASE 3: URL NORMALIZATION + ADMISSION

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
dedupeSerpResults()
then frontier canonicalization

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
classifyUrlCandidate()
host, tier, role, doc_kind_guess
identity_match_level, variant_guard_hit, multi_model_hint

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Hard rejects before admission map
non_https, denied_host, url_cooldown
manufacturer_brand_mismatch, low_relevance

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Deterministic domain safety rows
blocked / safe / caution
no classifyDomains() call

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Later admission exclusion map
forum_subdomain, forum_classification
sibling_model_page, non-manufacturer multi_model_hint

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: PHASE 2: QUERY EXECUTION

span.p:
Optional internal-first branch
frontier query cache or searchSourceCorpus()

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Internal search only suppresses external search
when required coverage is being enforced
and internalMinResults is met

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
searchProviderAvailability()
google/bing/dual readiness is SearXNG-backed

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
runSearchProviders()
SearXNG attempt plans by provider mode

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
If zero internet results
buildQueryPlanFallbackResults()
provider = plan_fallback

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
If no provider and no raw results
buildPlanOnlyResults()
provider = plan

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: searchProfileBase + llmQueries + uberSearchPlan + planningHints.extraQueries

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
5 initial streams
base_template + targeted(queries)
llm + uber + runtime_extra

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
dedupeQueryRows()
merge duplicate sources, fields, and hints
cap = dedupeQueriesCap

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
prioritizeQueryRows()
site/doc/brand/model/field/hint scoring

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
rankedCappedQueries
slice(0, max(queryLimit, 6))

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
enforceIdentityQueryGuard()
legacy query rows

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Guard hostPlanQueryRows later
drop duplicates against legacy rows
append up to max(2, min(8, queryLimit))

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Write searchProfilePlanned
status = planned
selected_queries + query_guard
